scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:cli && npm run build:web
scripts.build:all-sites: npm run build:www && npm run build:json && npm run build:web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @rediacc/shared && npm run build -w @rediacc/shared-desktop && npm run build -w @rediacc/provisioning
scripts.check:i18n: tsx scripts/check-translation-hashes.ts && tsx scripts/check-translation-completeness.ts && tsx scripts/check-translation-key-usage.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-inline-translations.ts && tsx scripts/check-www-only-translations.ts && tsx scripts/check-docs-untranslated-text.ts && tsx scripts/check-account-email-templates.ts && npm run validate:cli-docs -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:docs-cli-usage -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:landing-cli-usage -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:translation-freshness -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:tutorial-audio -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:content -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:content-accuracy -w @rediacc/www && npm run validate:comparison-refs -w @rediacc/www && tsx scripts/check-component-hardcoded-strings.ts --strict
scripts.check:lint: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 eslint packages scripts private/account --max-warnings 0 && biome lint private/account/ --error-on-warnings
scripts.check:types: tsc -b packages/shared packages/shared-desktop packages/provisioning packages/cli packages/desktop packages/e2e && npm run typecheck -w @rediacc/web && tsc --noEmit -p private/account/tsconfig.json
scripts.clean: npm run clean -w @rediacc/shared && npm run clean -w @rediacc/cli && npm run clean -w @rediacc/web
scripts.dev:parity: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @rediacc/web
scripts.fix: npm run fix:format && npm run fix:lint
scripts.fix:all: npm run fix:format && npm run fix:lint && npm run fix:unused && npm run fix:i18n
scripts.fix:lint: NODE_OPTIONS=--max-old-space-size=8192 eslint packages scripts private/account --fix && biome lint --fix private/account/
scripts.ci: npm run check:version && npm run check:deps && npm run lint && npm run check:lint && npm run lint:unused && npm run check:format && npm run check:i18n && npm run check:types && npm run check:test && npm run check:ci-npmrc && npm run check:ci-peer-deps && npm run check:ci-security-audit && npm run check:ci-shell-lint && npm run check:ci-shell-format && npm run check:ci-shell-commands && npm run check:ci-workflows && npm run check:ci-compose-env && npm run check:ci-e2e-coverage && npm run check:ci-editorconfig && npm run check:ci-account-portal && npm run check:ci-account-server && npm run check:ci-renet && npm run check:ci-subscription-schema
scripts.typecheck: tsc -b packages/shared packages/shared-desktop packages/provisioning packages/cli packages/desktop packages/e2e && npm run typecheck -w @rediacc/web && tsc --noEmit -p private/account/tsconfig.json
